Data on the 'Net

November 1995
TechnologyJournalism & Newsroom

News organizations like the Virginian Pilot and Detroit's WDIV-TV are providing publicly accessible data online, reflecting a growing trend of transparency in journalism.

Among the news organizations that offer data on the Internet are the Virginian Pilot at http://data.pilotonline.com and Detroit's WDIV-TV http://www.wdiv.com/index.htm
